arts.ttl: Cole Palmer closes in on Mo Salah record with Brighton quadruple
arts.sum: Chelsea attacker Cole Palmer is closing in on a Premier League record after bagging four goals in the first half of the Blues’ clash against Brighton. Palmer has yet to fail with a penalty in his career and he is rapidly closing in on the Premier League record of Mohamed Salah .

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs. Brighton: Cole Palmer sets Premier League record with four-goal haul
arts.sum: Chelsea playmaker Cole Palmer makes Premier League history with an incredible four-goal haul during the first half of Saturday's Premier League fixture against Brighton & Hove Albion.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Palmer scores record 4 first-half goals
arts.sum: Cole Palmer became the first player to score four goals in the first half of a Premier League match as Chelsea led Brighton 4-2 at half time on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer sets Premier League record with four-goal first half against Brighton
arts.sum: Palmer became the first player in league history to strike four times before the half-time interval

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans are all saying the same thing about Robert Sanchez during his display vs Brighton
arts.sum: Chelsea fans are all saying the same thing about Robert Sanchez after his error during the Brighton clash.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer sets insane record and matches another with latest Chelsea goal glut
arts.sum: Cole Palmer has set a new Premier League record in unbelievable fashion on Saturday. The Chelsea star was in unstoppable form at Stamford Bridge as he put four past Brighton in an insane 20-minute period of the game. arts.ttl: 'What a bad game!' | Soccer Sat panel in hysterics at Chelsea-Brighton chaos!
arts.sum: The Soccer Saturday crew were in disbelief at the scenes at Stamford Bridge between Chelsea and Brighton!

arts.ttl: 9 Best Players to Wear the Number 10 Shirt for Chelsea (Ranked)
arts.sum: Including Eden Hazard and Joe Cole, Chelsea have been blessed with legendary players to wear the famous number 10 shirt over the years.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Brighton: This is why key Brighton trio Jan Paul van Hecke, Simon Adingra and Joel Veltman are surprise absentees
arts.sum: It has now become clear why a key Brighton trio is missing from the squad picked to face Chelsea.

arts.ttl: 'Like I said': Nigel Reo-Coker shares whether he thinks Chelsea finish in the Premier League top four
